label: CompTIA Cybersecurity Analyst (Exam CS0-003)
description: Prepare for CompTIA Cybersecurity Analyst (Exam CS0-003) with concise study notes focused on blue team defense, security monitoring, threat hunting, and intelligence-led analysis. This course covers SOC workflows, SIEM and EDR investigation, log analysis, vulnerability management, incident response, cloud and hybrid network telemetry, and the techniques needed to detect, triage, and respond to malicious activity with confidence.
